whyItMatters: Cursor CEO 6 days ago: "I started coding when I was 12" Meanwhile today he launched a direct GitHub competitor, a 1.5T frontier model trained from scratch and an iOS app to code from anywhere. all at their first ever conference. 15 people in a room two years ago. now 700 people and 60% of the Fortune 500. this was a declaration of war on the entire develope…
